name: Predaplant Lilizard
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>捕食植物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>プレデター・プランツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>テッポウリザード
desc: If you control a "Predaplant" or "Starving Venom" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; it becomes DARK until the end of this turn. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Predaplant Lilizard" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a "Predaplant" or "Starving Venom" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; it becomes DARK until the end of this turn. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Predaplant Lilizard" once per turn.
eff: If you control a "Predaplant" or "Starving Venom" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; it becomes DARK until the end of this turn. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Predaplant Lilizard" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
